The famous Irish Coffee here is world-renowned for a reason ☕️🥃

I would say it rightfully ranks among the best in the world – because it is usually prepared incorrectly almost everywhere.

You can tell by the foam whether true professionals were at work here 🤍✨
It must be light, creamy, and perfectly floating on the coffee – like a small art form in itself ☕️

Since 1952, this perfection has been maintained at the Buena Vista Café, cup by cup 🇺🇸☘️

A classic that shows: Simple does not equal simply good 😊✨

Great friendly staff. Grab a seat at the bar and relax. 
The best Irish and Bailey's coffees we have ever had. 
This place is a must for a nightcap before bed ❤️

We visited this bar while on holiday from Ireland after seeing lots of positive videos about it on social media, so we were really looking forward to the experience. Unfortunately, aside from the Irish coffees (which were excellent), our visit was very disappointing.

We visited in the late morning/early afternoon and were greeted at the door by Salvador, who was very welcoming and friendly. He gave us a warm first impression and provided excellent service when showing us in.

However, our experience with the bar staff was unfortunately very different. After being directed to sit at the bar near the food area, a bartender approached us and abruptly asked what we wanted. When we explained that we were only there for drinks, we were told quite bluntly that we should move elsewhere. The interaction felt unnecessarily rude and unwelcoming.

After moving to the other side of the bar, we ordered four Irish coffees between the two of us. This seemed to attract an unusual reaction from staff, with comments being made about the number of drinks ordered, which left us feeling uncomfortable and out of place. We also felt that staff were watching and discussing us afterwards, which added to the awkward atmosphere.

It’s a shame, because the Irish coffees themselves were genuinely excellent, and Salvador’s welcome at the door was the highlight of the experience. However, the bartender service felt cold and unfriendly, there was very little atmosphere, and we did not feel welcome during our visit. We left feeling disappointed, especially given the reputation this place has online. Unfortunately, based on our experience, I wouldn’t recommend it.
